description: GetDisplayName uses dictionary indexer (DisplayNames[level]) which throws KeyNotFoundException with an unhelpful message when called with an invalid SkillLevel value. Since C# enums are not constrained to defined values, any cast integer is a valid SkillLevel.
suggestedFix: Use TryGetValue with an ArgumentOutOfRangeException: if (!DisplayNames.TryGetValue(level, out var name)) throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(level), level, $"No display name for skill level {level}"); return name;
